Dear Dr. Lim,

We are pleased to offer you the position of Senior Data Scientist with Quantum InnoTech Pte Ltd (UEN: 201912345D), subject to the terms and conditions outlined in this employment offer letter (the "SPA"). Your monthly salary will be SGD 12,000, payable on the last working day of each month.

Please note that this offer is contingent upon the successful completion of your background check and reference verification. Kindly confirm your acceptance by signing below and returning a copy to us at your earliest convenience. Should you have any questions regarding the project status or project plan, feel free to contact our HR department.

For any further inquiries, you may reach out to us at +65 6123 4567 or email hr@quantum-innotech.sg. Your employee ID will be linked to your NRIC, accessible via https://quantum-innotech.sg/user/S1234567A.

We look forward to welcoming you to our team.

Sincerely,

Mr. John Tan  
Head of Human Resources  
Quantum InnoTech Pte Ltd  
Phone: +65 6876 5432
